action_content:
df['aac'] = df['aac'].fillna(df['aac'].median())
df['alm1'] = df['alm1'].fillna(df['alm1'].median())
df['alm2'] = df['alm2'].fillna(df['alm2'].mode()[0])
df['name'] = df['name'].fillna(df['name'].mode()[0])
